description: Use this API to define an area subsystem. This API routine was first introduced in release 30.0.0. ierr = asys(sid, num, areas)

parameters.name: sid
parameters.description: Valid area subsystem id. valid area subsystem ids range from 0 to 11. (input).

parameters.name: areas
parameters.description: An array of NUM elements specifying array that contains the areas to set. (input).
